message:
feat(ui): improve clear filters button with count badge

- Add filter count badge showing number of active filters
- Use proper Button component with X icon
- Add disabled state when no filters active
- Improve accessibility with descriptive aria-label
- Refresh sitemap timestamps

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
